channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Are Washington's Most Important Gulf Allies on a Collision Course?
item.description: The Saudi-UAE rivalry will shape the future Middle East.

item.title: Suspect killed after firing at White House security checkpoint, Secret Service reports
item.description: A person who opened fire near a White House security checkpoint on Saturday was fatally shot by responding officers, according to the U.S. Secret Service.

item.title: Next Conservative Leaders Must Champion Civility
item.description: In his upcoming book, the former vice president argues that public figures have a duty to practice compromise.

item.title: What Defines a Great Children's Treasury
